lever.name: on-demand scalar fast-path dense slots
lever.summary: Remove the separate max_var_index scan from the guarded scalar-F64 Add/Mul value_and_grad fast path. Dense scalar slots now grow on demand while preserving the same DENSE_AD_VALUE_STORE_MAX_SLOTS fallback threshold.

benchmark.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-5u1l7-<baseline|candidate>-8ef49b7e-20260609 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --noplot
benchmark.rch_note: Both final baseline and candidate selected vmi1153651 and fell open locally after the same remote topology preflight failure.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Equation traversal, reverse traversal, Add cotangent accumulation order, repeated-Mul cotangent order, and output/gradient order are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: The same scalar f64 + and * operations run in the same order. No reassociation, FMA, SIMD, mixed precision, or tolerance relaxation was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: VarIds requiring more than DENSE_AD_VALUE_STORE_MAX_SLOTS slots still return Ok(None) and fall back to the generic tape path. Unsupported dtype, literal, primitive, arity, params, effects, custom VJPs, and sub-Jaxprs keep the existing fallback/error behavior.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG primitive or state is routed.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-5u1l7-check-8ef49b7e-20260609 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-ad --all-targets
validation.result: passed on remote vmi1227854; pre-existing fj-trace unused-variable warning only

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-5u1l7-test-8ef49b7e-20260609 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-ad --lib
validation.result: passed via RCH local fail-open; 364 passed, 0 failed

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch-5u1l7-clippy-8ef49b7e-20260609 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-ad --all-targets -- -D warnings -A unused-variables -A clippy::too_many_arguments -A clippy::doc_lazy_continuation -A clippy::excessive_precision -A clippy::manual_is_multiple_of -A clippy::needless_range_loop -A clippy::useless_vec

validation.result: nonzero on broad pre-existing file inventory; UBS fmt, clippy, cargo check, test build, cargo audit, and cargo deny sections were clean

next: Reprofile value_and_grad after landing; if fj-ad remains top, the next deeper primitive is cached scalar fast-path metadata or an arena/compiled scalar tape, not another scan-only tweak.
